svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    GPIO Configuration and Modes
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- GPIO Pin -->
  <rect x="180" y="60" width="60" height="30" fill="#1565C0" rx="4" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="80" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    GPIO Pin
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Configuration Modes -->
  <rect x="50" y="120" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="145" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Input Mode
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <rect x="250" y="120" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="310" y="145" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Output Mode
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Arrows from GPIO to modes -->
  <line x1="210" y1="90" x2="110" y2="120" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="210" y1="90" x2="310" y2="120" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>

  <!-- Input Sub-modes -->
  <rect x="30" y="180" width="80" height="30" fill="#64B5F6" rx="4" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="70" y="200" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Digital
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <rect x="30" y="220" width="80" height="30" fill="#64B5F6" rx="4" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="70" y="240" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Analog
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <rect x="30" y="260" width="80" height="30" fill="#64B5F6" rx="4" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="70" y="280" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Pull-up
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Output Sub-modes -->
  <rect x="310" y="180" width="80" height="30" fill="#64B5F6" rx="4" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="350" y="200" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Push-Pull
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <rect x="310" y="220" width="80" height="30" fill="#64B5F6" rx="4" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="350" y="240" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Open-Drain
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <rect x="310" y="260" width="80" height="30" fill="#64B5F6" rx="4" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="4.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="350" y="280" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    PWM
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Arrows from modes to sub-modes -->
  <line x1="110" y1="160" x2="70" y2="180" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="4.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="110" y1="160" x2="70" y2="220" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="4.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="110" y1="160" x2="70" y2="260" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="4.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>

  <line x1="310" y1="160" x2="350" y2="180" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="5.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="310" y1="160" x2="350" y2="220" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="5.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="310" y1="160" x2="350" y2="260" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="5.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
</svg>
